abstract: The object that contains JSON data for a data table.
overview:
## Discussion

The `RecordStore` object uses two required properties to provide the `data` for a table and to specify how that data will be used in the table.

For example, your data `descriptors` might describe a table that contains stock symbols and prices; each data record could provide the symbol and price for a particular stock.

This object can be used in [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/DataTable].

### Example

items.description: Define and provide data records that fit within the structure defined by descriptors for a data table.

items.name: FloatDataFormat

items.description: The object that allows you to specify the minimum and maximum dimensions for images in data table cells.
items.name: ImageDataFormat
